subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, bringing joy and spiritual delight. Ever hast thou shown perfect love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب واصل گردید و روح و ریحان حاصل شد همواره کمال محبت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @business; financial; property matters, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
